root_cause: The test is trying to access a property of an undefined object.
evidence_lines: test\ttest\2023-10-01T12:00:14Z ✖ Test suite failed to run
test\ttest\2023-10-01T12:00:14Z Error: TypeError: Cannot read property 'foo' of undefined
test\ttest\2023-10-01T12:00:15Z  ● Test suite failed to run
test\ttest\2023-10-01T12:00:15Z Test suite failed due to the above error.
remediation_steps: Check if the object being accessed is defined before accessing its properties.
Add null checks or default values to prevent accessing properties of undefined.
